title: Karmorakcraft
description: A Semi Realistic Friendly x64 Mix-Resourcepack
body:
A x64 Mix-Resourcepack in a friendly collorfull semi-realistic steel. With textures consisting mostly of Misa, MeineKraft & WinthorMedieval, see the Credits section for more info.
I Created it for myself until i found out that its not that hard to get the permissions of all remnaining textures from the authors, so i decided to ask for the [Permissions](https://docs.google.com/document/d/191ciHOrsVeErcduonUHNdbpX0wXSaGgrv3n3lvdkLWI/edit?tab=t.0) and upload it, aaand here it is.


**[Changelog](https://docs.google.com/document/d/132VYcxEoU0EfA7Knug8qhFJe4bWTfA5HP3MZDPVSwR0/edit?usp=sharing)**
See the whole Changelog here: (not up to date will do later)

**[Credits](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1E3WYTeyjKBBvZ7899KmI7IF83QEIahEbc7I8dAra66c/edit?usp=sharing)**
